# FileQuestionMark

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="FileQuestionMark icon">

data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FileQuestionMark;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FileQuestionMark { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
